import { logger } from './src/utils/logger.js' import { Alpine } from './src/alpine/index.js' import { usePrizeDefinitionState, usePrizeDefinitionMethods } from './src/modules/prize-definition/composables/prize-definitions.js' document.addEventListener('alpine:init', () => { logger.info('[PrizeDefinitionPage] 注册 Alpine 组件...') Alpine.data('prizeDefinitionPage', () => ({ ...usePrizeDefinitionState(), ...usePrizeDefinitionMethods() })) })
